description: Graphics, elements, and functionality designed for supporting the IsoRealms Spindizzy remake.

categories.Textures: Textures in the style of Spindizzy, such as lifts and terrain.
categories.Models: Models in the style of Spindizzy, such as crafts and jewels.

Ball.description: Textures in the style of the C64 Spindizzy Ball craft.  These textures are designed to be applied to billboarded sprites.

fill.name: Fill Colour
fill.description: Main colour of this ball texture.

shine.name: Shine Colour
shine.description: Colour of the 'shine' on the upper part of this ball texture.

outline.name: Outline Colour
outline.description: Colour of the outline around the edge of this ball texture.

C64LiftGraphics.description: Sets of textures intended for use as lift elements, in the style of C64 Spindizzy.

primary.name: Primary Colour
primary.description: Primary colour used in this set of textures.

secondary.name: Secondary Colour
secondary.description: Secondary colour used in this set of textures.

outline.name: Outline Colour
outline.description: Outline colour used in this set of textures.

C64TerrainGraphics.description: Sets of texture intended to be applied to terrain elements, in the style of C64 Spindizzy.

floor.name: Floor Colour
floor.description: Colour mainly applied to textures to be used as floors.

wall.name: Wall Colour
wall.description: Colour mainly applied to textures to be used as walls.  Note that this colour is mixed with the floor texture to generate a second variation of the standard wall texture for displaying at a different angle.

grid.name: Grid Colour
grid.description: Colour mainly applied to the grid pattern used on walls and floors.

highlight.name: Detail Colour
highlight.description: Colour that adds extra variation to some textures.

DebrisChunk.description: Simple tetrahedron models that can be used to represent chunks of derbis from a destroyed craft.

side1.name: Side 1 Colour
side1.description: Colour of one side of this debris chunk model.

side2.name: Side 2 Colour
side2.description: Colour of one side of this debris chunk model.

side3.name: Side 3 Colour
side3.description: Colour of one side of this debris chunk model.

side4.name: Side 4 Colour
side4.description: Colour of one side of this debris chunk model.

outline.name: Outline Colour
outline.description: Colour of the outline of around the edge of this debris chunk model.

Gyroscope.description: Models in the style of the C64 Spindizzy Gyroscope craft.

colour1.name: Quadrant 1 Colour
colour1.description: Colour of one quadrant of this gyroscope model.

colour2.name: Quadrant 2 Colour
colour2.description: Colour of one quadrant of this gyroscope model.

colour3.name: Quadrant 3 Colour
colour3.description: Colour of one quadrant of this gyroscope model.

colour4.name: Quadrant 4 Colour
colour4.description: Colour of one quadrant of this gyroscope model.

outline.name: Outline Colour
outline.description: Colour of the outline of around the edge of this gyroscope model.

Jewel.description: Models in the style of C64 Spindizzy jewels, including colour changing panels.

colour.name: Panel Phase Colour
colour.description: Panels of this jewel model will phase through this colour.

frame.name: Outline Colour
frame.description: Outline colour of this jewel model.

Top.description: Models in the style of the C64 Spindizzy Top craft.

top.name: Top Colour
top.description: Colour of the top of this model.

sides.name: Side Colour
sides.description: Colour of the sides of this model.

outline.name: Outline Colour
outline.description: Colour of the outline around the edges of this model.
